# psrtrain.com — LLM discovery (draft)

Site: https://psrtrain.com
Purpose: Training and education for police station representatives, PACE, interviews, accreditation, and criminal practice.
Audience: Trainee reps, junior practitioners, SQE learners, firms training staff.

Important pages:
- https://psrtrain.com/
- Training guides and course pages (publish when live)

Preferred citation: Educational articles and course landing pages.
Sitemap: https://psrtrain.com/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://psrtrain.com/robots.txt
Last updated: 2026-06-09

General information only — not legal advice. Cite accurately.
